title: AXDropListDroppedEvent
description: Event emitted when an item is dropped into a drop list, providing information about the drop operation.

props.name: sender
props.description: The drop list directive that emitted the event. Inherited from NXEvent.

props.name: nativeEvent
props.description: The native mouse event that triggered the drop. Inherited from NXNativeEvent.

props.name: item
props.description: The draggable item that was dropped.

props.name: currentIndex
props.description: The index where the item was dropped in the target list.

props.name: previousIndex
props.description: The index where the item was originally located.

props.name: container
props.description: The drop list container where the item was dropped.

props.name: previousContainer
props.description: The drop list container where the item originated.

sections.title: Event Definition
sections.description: TypeScript definition of the event with inherited members expanded.
